text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the turn of the year, Tamamo Cross enters
her classic year.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year, Trainer! Here's to another year
with ya.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Gotta say though, it's lonely bein' way out here
on New Year's instead of home with my family.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not packin' my bags yet. I can't... Not until
I got some big wins to bring back with me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
These two years are gonna be our time to shine.
I'm countin' on ya, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We renew the promise we made to each other.
Our Twinkle Series takedown is really going to
ramp up this year.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sides, even if I can't be there with 'em, I can at
least call everyone. I'll have to give Mom a ring
later before I go crazy...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I may not be your mother, but I'd be more than
happy to be your mommy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Creek, you're here too?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Why yes, I'm here to welcome in the new year.
Tamtam, Trainer, let's all have a wonderful twelve
months!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
This year will be a very special one for me too,
you see.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, because I'm considering entering the
Twinkle Series this autumn.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm not quite ready to be running with you yet,
Tamtam, but with enough effort, I think I can get
there.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! For real?! You're gonna debut too? That's
some nice news to be kickin' off the new year
with!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Which reminds me... I'm pretty sure
you-know-who's gonna debut, too. Hehe.
Things're gonna get lively!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll be seeing more and more juniors debut this
year. The lineup's definitely about to change in a
big way.
choice_data_list:
I'm curious to hear what both of your New
Year's resolutions are.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, let's see... Well, if I had to say...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I think my New Year's resolution would be to spoil
Tamtam.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You wanna do what?! That's da wishy-washiest resolution I ever heard! C'mon, make it somethin' like gettin' ya first win!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hmm. All right, let's go with that, then.
choice_data_list:
What's your New Year's resolution, Tamamo
Cross?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Do ya even gotta ask?! I'm gonna make everyone
back home extra happy!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh... But that's been your goal for a while, hasn't
it? You mentioned it a fair few times last year as
well.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well... yeah. I guess it's more of an ongoin' goal
than a resolution, huh?
choice_data_list:
Yeah. Why not make the New Year's one
something fun and easy, then?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't want her burning herself out working too
hard. Hopefully she'll take the suggestion...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Ya might be right, Trainer. If ya can't have
a little fun at New Year's, when can ya?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hm, now what would be a fun thing to do this
year...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's a good one! I'll work on my quips! Good
comebacks have gotta be snappy, after all.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Soon as someone gives me an openin', they're
gettin' roasted! Any time, anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Of all the experiences unique to New
Year's, there's really nothing better than a solo
run.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Get outta here! You run solo every day of da
week!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: My "New Year's resolution"? A fitting question for the beginning of January. Hmm, I suppose...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: At the very least, it would have to be HD. Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Da year's just started and you're droppin'
groaners already?! Reeeal cute!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Tch, I drew a dud. Nothing lucky about this
fortune slip. An amateur would call it a day. But...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: I'll pick a winner this time!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You some kinda dummy?! Ya can't just keep
pullin' till ya get da result ya want!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Trainer, it's not so easy doin' this with Tracen Academy folks...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The year's just started and there are comeback
opportunities flying left, right, and center. It
looks like Tamamo Cross is getting plenty of
practice.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Now yer talkin'! Okay, who here's up for a takoyaki bash?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Let's all meet up at Trainer's place in twenty. I'll
bring the grill.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nice, the color's lookin' good. Another minute on
the grill and they'll be good to go.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Um, Tamtam? I didn't see you put any octopus
inside these takoyaki. Are they supposed to be
like that?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yep. Nothin' wrong with regular takoyaki, but I
figured I'd shake things up with the fillings this
time.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Just trust me, yeah? These are my special
octopus-free takoyaki—I swear you're gonna dig
'em!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a bite of the fluffy little ball... and find a
wonderful burst of flavor waiting inside. Enjoying
the food together, the three of us have a relaxing
New Year's.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh, nice! How about we go sightseein', then?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We don't get the chance to go on casual outings
all that often. Let's make good on the occasion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, to my surprise, we soon find ourselves at
an art gallery.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Heh! Sure is nice checkin' out art every now 'n
then. I'm a fan, ya know. Kinda.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Really? I had no idea.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yep. I know a guy who sells antiques.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
When I was a kid, he used to show 'em to me all
the time. But there sure are a lotta masterpieces
here in Tokyo. They even had a piece by
Umachelangelo...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't have guessed Tamamo Cross was a fan
of art. Our stroll around the gallery seems to have
stimulated her imagination.
